stella.note: WK16 report received; full Google+Meta view lands in Wed Refined Pulse

klaviyo.note: Placed Order attribution still in 24–72h lag window; Triple Whale is source of truth

signals.text: $97.2K (+15.6% WoW) — #1 week YTD on Buy Box recovery to 67.9%. Hero singles Bergamot/Ginger, Simply Unscented, and Rosemary Mint all back in Buy Box and revenue up 120–262%.
$28.5K (+20.7% WoW) with AOV jumping to $33.44 (+11.7%). CVR ticked up to 1.8% (+0.1pp). Best DTC week since mid-March.
Net +50 — an 82-sub swing from last week's -32. Active subs back to 4,112. First net-positive week in a month; rebound is real.
ROAS 0.8x on $4,815 spend (+29.2%). Prospecting/Traffic/Interests 2026 campaign ate $1,440 for $17 in attributed revenue — 0.0x. Retention/All RET is the only line paying (2.0x).
One Reel ("Desert-tested") drove 727K reach (+112%), 14.3K likes, 465 comments — ~97% of all weekly engagement. +349 followers to 78,904.

watchItems.action: Restructure or pause B07H77H8ZM Sponsored Products bids
watchItems.why: Sensitive Unscented is eating 35.6% of Amazon ad spend at 68.3% ACoS / 1.46x ROAS. Flagged to PLTFRM; need written plan back from Holly before next call.
$1,440 for 1 purchase (0.0x ROAS) is dead budget. Reallocate to Retention/All RET (the only 2.0x line) or hold for new creative. Brief Stella for Wed.
+50 net is an 82-sub swing. Ask Cassie for cohort source so Cooper can brief amplification (welcome flow tweak, paid retargeting on reactivators).
One Reel = 727K reach at ~$9 CPM, outperforming paid prospecting creative. Brief Calvin on two more in the format; consider Spark Ad boost.

amazon.insight: Best week YTD at $97.2K gross (+15.6% WoW), powered by Buy Box recovery to 67.94% (+1.0pp). Hero singles Bergamot/Ginger (+21.3pp BB, rev +120%), Simply Unscented (+46.9pp BB, rev +262%), and Rosemary Mint (+43pp BB, rev +218%) are the primary drivers. TACOS 4.83% and ROAS 8.59x stay well inside the 8.3% guardrail — room to scale. Watch item: B07H77H8ZM Sensitive Unscented = 35.6% of account ad spend at 68.3% ACoS / 1.46x ROAS.

dtc.insight: DTC breakout week — $28.5K (+20.7% WoW), AOV up to $33.44 (+11.7%), CVR nudging back toward target at 1.8%. Email's share of DTC jumped to 27% on Klaviyo revenue of $7.7K (+24.4%). Sessions up 26.7% to 30,694 and conversion held flat despite the traffic surge — quality is back.

subscriptions.insight: First net-positive week in a month — +50 net, an 82-sub swing from last week's -32. Active subs back to 4,112. Need to identify what drove the rebound (campaign, content, or churn mechanical) so Cooper can amplify. Ask Cassie for the cohort source.

topPost.description: Desert-tested Reel — drove ~97% of weekly engagement. Video-first format continues to dominate.

social.insight: One Reel carried the week — 'Desert-tested' drove 727K reach (+112%), 14.3K likes, 465 comments. Follower growth +349 to 78,904. Brief Calvin on 2 more in the format and consider a Spark Ad boost while engagement is hot.

google.note: Stella Rising WK16 report received 4/20; full Google+Meta view lands in Wed Refined Pulse.

paidMedia.insight: Meta ROAS 0.8x on $4,815 spend (+29.2%). Prospecting/Traffic/Interests 2026 is dead weight — $1,440 for $17 attributed (0.0x). Retention/All RET (2.0x) is carrying. Immediate action: pause Prospecting line and reallocate to Retention or hold for new creative.

ga4.insight: Sessions surged to 30,694 (+26.7%); CVR held flat at 1.13%. Aluminum-free deodorant PDP captured 47% of all site traffic — a single page is carrying discovery.

klaviyo.insight: Total Klaviyo attributed revenue $7,694 (+24.4% WoW), 27% of DTC. Energize Bundle (4/14) was top performer at 51.0% open rate on 44K sends. Placed Order attribution still in 24–72h lag — Triple Whale is source of truth for the week.
